mapper.select: SELECT * FROM PAYROLL_MONTH WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND pay_year = #{payYear} AND pay_month = #{payMonth}
SELECT pm.*, m.id AS m_id, m.name AS m_name, m.phone AS m_phone FROM PAYROLL_MONTH pm JOIN member m ON pm.member_id = m.id WHERE pm.pay_year = #{payYear} AND pm.pay_month = #{payMonth}

SELECT m.id AS memberId, m.name AS memberName, m.phone AS memberPhone, SUM(pm.month_work_minutes) AS workMinutes, SUM(pm.month_juhyu_minutes) AS juhyuMinutes, AVG(pm.hourly_wage) AS hourlyWage, SUM(pm.month_work_pay) AS workPay, SUM(pm.month_juhyu_pay) AS juhyuPay, SUM(pm.month_work_pay + pm.month_juhyu_pay) AS totalPay FROM PAYROLL_MONTH pm JOIN member m ON pm.member_id = m.id WHERE pm.pay_year = #{year} GROUP BY m.id, m.name, m.phone ORDER BY m.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PAYROLL_MONTH (member_id, pay_year, pay_month, hourly_wage, month_work_minutes, month_juhyu_minutes, month_work_pay, month_juhyu_pay, month_total_pay, status, confirmed_at, paid_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{payYear}, #{payMonth}, #{hourlyWage}, #{monthWorkMinutes}, #{monthJuhyuMinutes}, #{monthWorkPay}, #{monthJuhyuPay}, #{monthTotalPay}, #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{confirmedAt}, #{paidAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE PAYROLL_MONTH SET hourly_wage = #{hourlyWage}, month_work_minutes = #{monthWorkMinutes}, month_juhyu_minutes = #{monthJuhyuMinutes}, month_work_pay = #{monthWorkPay}, month_juhyu_pay = #{monthJuhyuPay}, month_total_pay = #{monthTotalPay}, status = #{status, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, confirmed_at = #{confirmedAt}, paid_at = #{paidAt} WHERE id = #{id}
